network: We can't reach the sky right now. Check your connection.
timeout: The sky is taking longer than usual. Try again in a moment.
rateLimit: You've used today's searches. A new set opens at midnight.
quota: The sky's observatory is full today. Please try again later.
schema: Something unexpected came back. Please try again.
dateRange: That date range is too long. Try one year or less.
server: Something went wrong. Please try again.
